title: broadcast_to_group offline enqueue not guarded by group membership re-check
description: state.rs broadcast_to_group(): the member list is fetched before delivery begins. If a member leaves the group (GROUP_LEAVE) between list_group_members() and the enqueue loop, they receive an offline message for a group they are no longer in. The message is encrypted and opaque, so confidentiality is not violated, but the relay stores messages for ex-members indefinitely until the offline queue expires (72h). Low severity but violates the principle that leaving a group stops delivery.
